reviews.review_description: People should really know that this is a demo showing how the game is gonna be when it fully comes out. They are gonna fix the glitches that you experienced in the demo so dont worry. It'll be worth it if it was 5 or 10 dollars but it should've be free because for a small team it takes a very long time for making a game with at least the same amount the levels in cup head. Trust the process guys its gonna be a wonderful game trust me
Great game but I’m not in the mood for waiting anymore it’s been 2 long around 3 years can we just know if it’s gonna come out or not

I see a lot of people complaining that no one’s online because this (as far as im concerned) is a join code specific only, it’s not public lobbies, only private codes. Anyway this is one of the best games I’ve ever played and I can’t wait for full release
The game is really fun and challenging, but when you beat the only level, your only choices are either uninstalling the game or replaying the level over and over again.

reviews.review_title: Cant wait for the full game
reviews.review_description: This is a psa to everyone they will release the full game in quarter 1of 2026. They have a website
This is the funst adventure game I have ever played, me and my friends laughed for hours. The only problem is that there's only one level. Still 5 star, I highly recommend.
I’ve heard there’s more levels soon
Omg update yalls game i got this game like a year ago and keep checking on it and hoping tall add a new level like good grief did all just forget
Uhhhh let me start no one was playing
It’s a fun game but for some reason I can’t play any other maps apart from the first one
My favorite game is this the puzzles are great every thing is great ok buttttttttt there is only one level 😡😡😡😡😡😡😡

This game is amazing! I played it with friends and I couldn't believe how good it was. The puzzles are unbelievable. I just can't believe this is all possible in a VR game. The one level is amazing, and I can't wait to see what's in store for more levels.

It needs more players i cant play a game without someone by my side and it needs more levels its so boring without More levels it does not mean its a bad game its perfect the locomotion is okay not the best for some people i love the game tho you should play it as long as you do not have very bad motion sickness 10\10
I don’t get this because my brother has this and he was playing it and there was no one online. It was multiplayer but it didn’t let him play with his friends so I don’t know if I get it￼
I joined cool intro but i went to play no people waited for 30 minutes

This game was better then I thought it was gonna be and it shocked me when I realized it was only a demo, Can’t wait for more globes!
(Also forgot if disabling snap turning is a thing but if not please add that feature I would appreciate it a lot)

The game is really good, but they need to keep working on it, I had so much fun me and my friend made a video about it pls make more levels cuz going though time and space, the ocean, and more sound fun, #BRINGITBACK
This game has to be the best co op game ever its just that it has 1 level. Cant wait for the full gam3 to release
Update ya game
I love this game because it is just likeni am cat
If this game costed money I would still buy it
I be a level the first level in the game. It didn’t give me the second level. It’s kind of bug. Can you please fix it?
In my opinion all it needs is more levels but it’s still good actually amazing
MAKE MORE LEVELS PLEASE!!!!
This game was hella fun to play with my homie Kellen, the puzzles are decently challenging and equally as fun! All it needs it more levels and it could get GOTY I love it so much
So bad

developer_response.body: Hi there, we're sorry you've had a bad experience. Could you share some details on what went wrong?

reviews.review_description: Great game but it needs more levels but other ghan that it is a great game 10/10
I love this game but there are no public servers
Very good game I hope they add updates to it and new maps to explore.

reviews.review_title: how long do I have to ￼
reviews.review_description:
can somebody tell me how long do I have to wait to get into a public lobby because every time I’m trying to get into a public lobby it takes too long to load and I’m don’t want to waste my battery 
￼
It's a great game and it's really fun to just do it over and over again but it is a little boring because it's only one level so I can't wait for the full version
Add more levels
The game is fun but no players :(
Good game, but PLEASE FOR THE LOVE OF GOD UPDATTTTTEEEEE
Soo funny with friends just get it.
Great game but there is only 1 map… it needs more
Good game 😄

I loved this demo, playing with friends to this puzzle game is absolutely fantastic. Just one problem: in my opinion the locomotion method sucks, I would have preferred the joystick control. For the rest, I hope the full game will be released as soon as possible! Shut up and take my money!
Its very imersive and fun for everyone, recommend.
More levels

I love this game, especially when I play with friends. Love the cosmetics you can put on￼. It’s a little buggy since it’s a demo, but overall it’s has great gameplay and good voice acting. Can’t wait until the full game comes out.

This is one of the best most fun games I have ever played but it feels like it was given up on. I did some digging and it seems the games has not updated for 2years and only has one level. Please I am begging update the game please.
Its coolest puzzle game I played before but he have 1 map and i want you make so many maps
The game was so so so fun but it really needs more levels
I love this game it's super fun! I just wish there were more levels. : (
One of if not the most fun I’ve had while playing with my friends
I was really excited about this game but even though I finished the first level and got the gold head I couldn’t get to level 2 and I listened to the ghost many times
This game is amazing and fun to play as well as the tricky parts ,but for some reason it won’t let me do the 2ndlevel so I’m stuck on the first
Really fun the first time but after you beat the first (and only) level you run out of stuff to do.
I love it to much but it is just that there only one level but I have hope you got this dev team I believe in you 🙂👻

Honestly this game is such a creative , fun way to do am escape room with other people from around the world (if you have friends in America and live in Europe like I do) you can play together easily and it's honestly so fun!!
This game is absolutely amazing but I don’t have as much fun because there is no one online.

The lack of normal locomotion options makes this unplayable for me. I couldn't even find the option for smooth rotation at least. I tried playing a 'public' game, but no one is playing. Wish there was single player at least so I can try the game and see if the awful locomotion actually makes some gameplay sense, but I couldn't find or figure out how to do it.

So me and my friend we completed the whole puzzle we were wondering how to get to the next level and it was just not fun anymore so please add more levels and when is the full version coming out and is it going to be free?

Hey it's fun and can be super cool! But I see the introduction is slow and should include subtitles AND the most important,  please include a stick movement option! Swinging arms is terrible! Cheers!!

The game is great, very nice and challenging missions, cool animations, funny ghost idea in general, it looks like everything is great BUT the movement is just horrible, I understand that beginners didn't like the joystick movement, and some people they prefer to teleport, but the movement solution is so bad, it is impossible to avoid motion sickness, just add a regular joystick movement with the possibility of teleportation and the game will be perfect.
I need the discord.(this game is great!)

My husband and I tried the demo for a little while and we love the concept! Just a few minor suggestions..

The first is that I became pretty motion sick really fast.. Especially because you get pushed away when getting close to tables and objects. A solution could be those vignettes that are sometimes used, or a helmet or something that blocks your view partially.

The second one is not being able to turn using the thumbstick. It could help prevent hitting furniture in our case xD

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! 

I agree thumbstick rotation is a great idea. Something we just hadn't got in, but is pretty vital.

We are also looking at the pushing away from objects, as it can be irritating, and uncomfortable.

Also congratulations on being the first reviewer for the game on Meta!

reviews.review_title: Very very very very very very very fun
reviews.review_description: Very very very very very very very fun
